name: Toms Favorite Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients for the crust and press into a 11x8 inch glass pan. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes. Cool completely.
2. Mix Jell-O and water according to package instructions. Add frozen berries and stir until combined. Pour over the cooled crust and place in the refrigerator until set.
3. Melt marshmallows and milk together, stirring constantly. Allow mixture to cool slightly.
4. Whip cream until stiff peaks form. Fold in the marshmallow mixture. Pour over the Jell-O center. Chill for at least 2 hours before serving. Keep refrigerated.
